# SDTM Knowledge Base - Routing Index

293 files from SDTM v2.0 + SDTMIG v3.4 (63 domains x 3 + 91 terminology + 6 model + 6 chapters + index).

## Entry Points
- `ROUTING.md` - question-type router (AI first stop)
- `VARIABLE_INDEX.md` - reverse index of 1,523 variables (variable -> domain + CT refs)

## Model (SDTM v2.0, `model/`)
- `01_concepts_and_terms.md` - Ch2: variable roles, qualifier subclasses, table structure
- `02_observation_classes.md` - Ch3.1: Interventions / Events / Findings / Identifiers / Timing
- `03_special_purpose_domains.md` - Ch3.2: DM, CO, SE, SJ, SV, SM
- `04_associated_persons.md` - Ch4: AP rules (APID/RSUBJID/RDEVID/SREL)
- `05_study_level_data.md` - Ch5: Trial Design (TE/TA/TX/TT/TP/TV/TD/TM/TI/TS/AC) + Study Refs (DI/OI)
- `06_relationship_datasets.md` - Ch6: RELREC, SUPP--, POOLDEF, RELSUB, DR, APRELSUB, RELSPEC

## Chapters (SDTMIG v3.4, `chapters/`)
- `ch01_introduction.md` - purpose, organization, changes from v3.3
- `ch02_fundamentals.md` - observations, variables, domains, GOC, new domains, disallowed vars
- `ch03_submitting_data.md` - standard/dataset metadata, primary keys, value-level metadata
- `ch04_general_assumptions.md` - domain/variable/coding/timing/other assumptions
- `ch08_relationships.md` - GRPID, RELREC, SUPP--, comments, data placement, RELSUB, RELSPEC
- `ch10_appendices.md` - glossary, controlled terminology, QNAM codes, naming, revision history

## Domains (`domains/<CODE>/`)
Each domain dir has 3 files: `spec.md` (variable table), `assumptions.md` (business rules), `examples.md` (data samples).

- **Special-purpose** (5): CO (Comments), DM (Demographics), SE (Subject Elements), SM (Subject Disease Milestones), SV (Subject Visits)
- **Interventions** (7): AG (Procedure Agents), CM (Concomitant/Prior Medications), EC (Exposure as Collected), EX (Exposure), ML (Meal Data), PR (Procedures), SU (Substance Use)
- **Events** (7): AE (Adverse Events), BE (Biospecimen Events), CE (Clinical Events), DS (Disposition), DV (Protocol Deviations), HO (Healthcare Encounters), MH (Medical History)
- **Findings** (32): BS (Biospecimen Findings), CP (Cell Phenotype Findings), CV (Cardiovascular System Findings), DA (Product Accountability), DD (Death Details), EG (ECG Test Results), FA (Findings About Events or Interventions), FT (Functional Tests), GF (Genomics Findings), IE (Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria Not Met), IS (Immunogenicity Specimen Assessments), LB (Laboratory Test Results), MB (Microbiology Specimen), MI (Microscopic Findings), MK (Musculoskeletal System Findings), MS (Microbiology Susceptibility), NV (Nervous System Findings), OE (Ophthalmic Examinations), PC (Pharmacokinetics Concentrations), PE (Physical Examination), PP (Pharmacokinetics Parameters), QS (Questionnaires), RE (Respiratory System Findings), RP (Reproductive System Findings), RS (Disease Response and Clin Classification), SC (Subject Characteristics), SR (Skin Response), SS (Subject Status), TR (Tumor/Lesion Results), TU (Tumor/Lesion Identification), UR (Urinary System Findings), VS (Vital Signs)
- **Trial Design** (7): TA (Trial Arms), TD (Trial Disease Assessments), TE (Trial Elements), TI (Trial Inclusion/Exclusion Criteria), TM (Trial Disease Milestones), TS (Trial Summary), TV (Trial Visits)
- **Relationship** (4): RELREC (Related Records), RELSPEC (Related Specimens), RELSUB (Related Subjects), SUPPQUAL (Supplemental Qualifiers)
- **Study Reference** (1): OI (Non-host Organism Identifiers)

## Terminology (`terminology/`)
Controlled terminology from SDTM Terminology.xlsx (1,005 codelists, 37,939 terms).

### Core (`terminology/core/`, 42 files)
- `ae.md` - Adverse Events
- `cp_part1.md`, `cp_part2.md` - Cell Phenotyping
- `disposition.md` - Disposition
- `dm.md` - Demographics
- `eg_part1.md` - `eg_part3.md` - ECG
- `findings_about.md` - Findings About
- `general_part1.md` - `general_part5.md` - cross-domain general
- `gf.md` - Genomics Findings
- `interventions.md` - Interventions
- `is_domain_part1.md`, `is_domain_part2.md` - Immunogenicity
- `lb_part1.md` - `lb_part4.md` - Laboratory
- `mi.md` - Microscopic Findings
- `microbiology_part1.md` - `microbiology_part3.md` - Microbiology
- `oi.md` - Non-host Organism
- `oncology_part1.md`, `oncology_part2.md` - Oncology (TU/TR/RS)
- `other_part1.md` - `other_part5.md` - CV, MK, NV, OE, PE, RE, RP, SC, SR, SS, UR
- `pk_part1.md` - `pk_part4.md` - Pharmacokinetics
- `qs_part1.md` - Questionnaires core
- `special_purpose.md` - special-purpose domains
- `trial_design.md` - Trial Design
- `vs.md` - Vital Signs

### Questionnaires (`terminology/questionnaires/`, 43 files)
`questionnaires_part1.md` - `questionnaires_part43.md` - 670 instrument codelists (BDI-II, ADAS-COG, HAM-D, BPI, EORTC, SF-36, UPDRS, etc.)

### Supplementary (`terminology/supplementary/`, 6 files)
`supplementary_part1.md` - `supplementary_part6.md` - 188 specialized codelists

## Source Documents
- SDTM v2.0 Final (2021-11-29), 74 pages
- SDTMIG v3.4, 461 pages
- SDTMIG v3.4 xlsx - 63 domain specifications
- SDTM Terminology xlsx - 1,005 codelists / 37,939 terms
